title: Xtra Smoky American Yukon Gold Potatoes Skillet
description: A smoky and flavorful weeknight dish featuring Yukon gold potatoes, perfect for a quick dinner, this recipe is also dairy-free-friendly. It combines the natural sweetness of potatoes with a smoky twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the sliced potatoes with smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the coated potatoes to the skillet, stirring to combine with the onion and garlic.
Transfer the skillet to the broiler and broil for 10 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the broiler and stir in the liquid smoke and cherry tomatoes.
Return the skillet to the stovetop over medium heat and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
